nodes.context: Splinter group of Los Zetas, founded in 2014, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, murder, oil theft. Operates in multiple Mexican states.
Original criminal organization from which Zetas Vieja Escuela splintered. Originated from Mexican Army special forces.
Rival cartel that executed a member of Zetas Vieja Escuela in March 2019 and was targeted by ZVE in retaliation.
Ally of Zetas Vieja Escuela according to the infobox.
Rival of Zetas Vieja Escuela according to the infobox.

edges.context: Zetas Vieja Escuela splintered from Los Zetas in 2014, founded by dissidents including José Guizar Valencia.
Members of CJNG executed a ZVE member in March 2019; ZVE retaliated by killing three alleged CJNG members in April 2019.
According to the infobox, Gulf Cartel is an ally of Zetas Vieja Escuela.
According to the infobox, Cártel del Noreste is a rival of Zetas Vieja Escuela.
